mapper.select:
select unit_code, unit_name, contact_person, contact_number, social_num, register_addr, cert_start, cert_end, serv_item, extra_info from t_ext_unit_lib
and exists ( select 1 from t_ext_unit_user u where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.unit_code = unit_code)
and unit_name like concat('%', #{unitName}, '%')
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_ext_unit_lib (unit_code, unit_name, contact_person, contact_number, social_num, register_addr, cert_start, cert_end, serv_item, extra_info) values (#{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactNumber}, #{socialNum}, #{registerAddr}, #{certStart}, #{certEnd}, #{servItem}, #{extraInfoStr})
